description: Seeded P4 fix-cycle violation (BLOCKER b, Codex second-opinion review): a case whose nested `input.patient` clinical sub-object carries an identifier-shaped field (`name`) that the top-level `case` property whitelist cannot see, because `input` is opaque to it. Previously validated cleanly because `clinicalInput.properties.patient` was `true` (unrestricted). Must now be rejected fail-closed by the schema layer's closed, patient-input-mirrored `clinicalPatient` shape.
